title: Complete property document uploads with extracted-data confirmation
description: Verifies that a customer can upload identity, IBI, and multi-page electricity bill documents, confirm extracted fields, and proceed to province selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Upload a valid image for the DNI/NIE front document
Wait for the extracted identity fields to be displayed
Confirm the extracted identity fields
Upload a valid image or PDF for the IBI document
Upload two valid pages for the electricity bill document
Confirm the extracted IBI and electricity bill fields
Proceed to the next step
Verify the province selection step is displayed

title: Apply all required signatures for Cataluña and continue
description: Verifies a customer can select Cataluña, apply all required signatures to the legal documents, see signed previews, and proceed to the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Select Cataluña as the province
Proceed to the representation (legal signing) step
Draw a signature on the signature pad canvas
Apply the signature to the current legal document
Repeat drawing and applying signatures until all required documents for the province are signed
Proceed to the next step
Verify signed document previews are displayed for all required legal documents and the user can continue past the signing step

title: Review checklist allows fixing an incomplete item and then submitting
description: Verifies the customer can use the review checklist to navigate to an incomplete section, complete it, return to review, and successfully submit.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Proceed to the review step
Select an incomplete checklist item to navigate to its section
Complete the required information for that section
Proceed back to the review step
Submit the project documentation
Verify a submission success screen is displayed indicating the documentation was sent

title: Redirect to project after successful phone lookup
description: Verifies that a customer can enter a Spanish mobile number, submit lookup, and be redirected into the project flow at the correct starting step.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill 600000001 into the phone number field
Submit the phone lookup
Verify the customer is redirected into the project flow for a specific project code and the first project step is displayed

title: Review a submitted project end-to-end from dashboard login to project details
description: Verifies an assessor can log in and open a submitted project to view its details successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click a project in the submitted projects list
Verify the selected project details view is displayed
Verify uploaded documents and extracted data are displayed

title: Apply two required signatures for Madrid/Valencia and continue
description: Verifies a customer can select a province requiring two signatures, sign both legal documents, and proceed to the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Select Madrid or Valencia as the province
Proceed to the representation (legal signing) step
Draw a signature on the signature pad canvas
Apply the signature to the first legal document
Draw a new signature on the signature pad canvas
Apply the signature to the second legal document
Verify both required legal documents show signed PDF previews and the user can proceed to the next step

title: Require DNI back upload when front-only is detected
description: Verifies that uploading only the DNI front triggers a requirement for the back side, and uploading the back enables proceeding to province selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Upload a valid image for the DNI front document
Wait for the identity extraction result to be displayed
Proceed to the next step
Verify a requirement to upload the DNI back is shown and progression is blocked
Upload a valid image for the DNI back document
Wait for the updated identity extraction result to be displayed
Proceed to the next step
Verify the province selection step is displayed

title: Complete energy certificate 4-step survey with signature and finalize
description: Verifies a customer can complete the full 4-step energy certificate survey, sign the certificate, and finalize successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Proceed to the energy certificate survey section
Fill in a valid cadastral reference into the cadastral reference field
Fill a valid number into the habitable area field
Select valid values for floor count and bedroom count
Proceed to the next survey step
Fill valid door and window counts for each orientation (N/E/S/W)
Proceed to the next survey step
Select a window frame material, glass type, and shutter presence
Proceed to the next survey step
Select thermal installation type, boiler fuel, air conditioning type, and heating emitter type
Select a product sold option and indicate existing customer status
Draw a signature on the signature pad canvas
Finalize the energy certificate
Verify the energy certificate is marked as completed and the user is returned to the overall flow with the certificate ready for review

title: Block submission when required checklist items are incomplete
description: Verifies the review step prevents submitting when required items are incomplete and communicates that submission cannot proceed.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Proceed to the review step
Attempt to submit the project documentation while some required items are incomplete
Verify submission does not complete and the review checklist indicates required items still need completion

title: Proceed to representation with three required signatures for Cataluña
description: Verifies that selecting Cataluña routes the customer to a representation step that requires three signatures before continuing.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Select Cataluña as the province
Proceed to the next step
Verify the representation step shows three required signature items

title: Download a project ZIP from project details
description: Verifies an assessor can initiate downloading the full project ZIP from a project details view.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click a project in the submitted projects list
Click the control to download the project ZIP
Verify a download has started

title: Skip representation when province has no signing requirement
description: Verifies that selecting a province with no signing requirement skips the representation step and continues to the next section of the flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Select a province that has no signing requirement
Proceed to the next step
Verify the app advances past representation to the next section of the flow

title: View document previews and extracted data within a project
description: Verifies an assessor can view uploaded document previews and corresponding extracted fields within a project details page.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click a project in the submitted projects list
Scroll through the project details content
Verify document preview content is displayed
Verify extracted field values are displayed

title: Skip the energy certificate survey and return to review
description: Verifies a customer can choose to skip the energy certificate survey and continue to the review stage without completing survey steps.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Proceed to the energy certificate survey section
Choose to skip the survey
Proceed forward in the flow
Verify the user lands on the review step and the energy certificate is indicated as skipped rather than completed

title: Proceed to representation with two required signatures for Madrid/Valencia
description: Verifies that selecting Madrid or Valencia routes the customer to a representation step that requires two signatures before continuing.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Select Madrid as the province
Proceed to the next step
Verify the representation step shows two required signature items

title: Export the project list as CSV
description: Verifies an assessor can export the dashboard project list to CSV successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the control to export the project list as CSV
Verify a download has started

title: Prevent proceeding when a required legal document is not signed
description: Verifies the customer cannot continue past representation until all required legal documents for the selected province are signed.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Select Cataluña as the province
Proceed to the representation (legal signing) step
Draw a signature on the signature pad canvas
Apply the signature to only the first legal document
Attempt to proceed to the next step
Verify the user remains in the signing step and a validation indicator shows that additional signatures are still required

title: Log out of the dashboard
description: Verifies an assessor can log out and return to the dashboard login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the control to log out
Verify the dashboard login screen is displayed

title: Signed PDF preview renders after applying a signature
description: Verifies that after signing a legal document, a PDF preview of the signed document is displayed for review.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Select Madrid or Valencia as the province
Proceed to the representation (legal signing) step
Draw a signature on the signature pad canvas
Apply the signature to the current legal document
Verify a signed PDF preview is displayed for the signed legal document

title: Validate required fields block progression within the energy survey
description: Verifies the survey prevents moving to the next step when required fields are missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Proceed to the energy certificate survey section
Leave the required fields in the current step empty
Attempt to proceed to the next survey step
Verify a validation error is visible and the user remains on the same survey step

title: Reject incorrect admin password and keep user on login
description: Verifies the dashboard denies access with an incorrect password and does not log the user in.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an access denied error is visible
Verify the dashboard login screen is still displayed

title: Show not-found error for unknown phone number
description: Verifies that submitting a phone number that is not found shows a not-found error and does not redirect into a project.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill 600000099 into the phone number field
Submit the phone lookup
Verify a phone not found error is visible
